title: pituranthos battandieri var. tuszonii
intro: Pituranthos battandieri var. tuszonii, also known as Pituranthos or Tuszon's Pituranthos, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Pituranthos battandieri var. tuszonii often include infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
